arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen ‘preparing’ for Xabi Alonso exit
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are reportedly making plans for life after Xabi Alonso with the young manager expected to join one of Europe’s biggest clubs next summer. The 42-year-old head coach was widely tipped to move on last summer after guiding the German outfit to a Bundesliga and German Cup double. Leverkusen lost just one match last […] The post Bayer Leverkusen ‘preparing’ for Xabi Alonso exit first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen boss: Boniface's availability against Brest "up in the air" after car crash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Simon Rolfes says it hasn't been decided yet if Victor Boniface will be part of the squad to face Stade Brest in the Champions League after the striker was involved in a car accident on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso stance on taking Man Utd job with Bayer Leverkusen preparing for exit
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso remains in high demand after his impressive start to life as Bayer Leverkusen manager, with a number of Premier League clubs showing an interest in the Spaniard

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola’s comments about Xabi Alonso speak volumes as Man City plan comes to light
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is yet to make a decision on his Manchester City future, but it seems the club are already eyeing up potential successors to the Catalan

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface has last laugh over Omar Marmoush in Bundesliga blockbuster
arts.sum: After a truly miserable international break for Ghana's Black Stars in the Africa Cup of Nations qualifiers, Mohammed Kudus and Jordan Ayew returned to Premier League action -- with decidedly mixed results. While the latter, coming off the back of last season's historic title-winning campaign, had scored four goals in his first six top flight outings so far, Marmoush had been in even more dazzling form, heading into the weekend with eight in six to sit atop the scoring charts.

arts.ttl: Stade Brest vs. Bayer Leverkusen preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Wednesday's UEFA Champions League clash between Stade Brest and Bayer Leverkusen, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid or Man City? The state of play
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are preparing for Xabi Alonso's 2025 departure, according to German media. At least that is according to Sky Germany, which reports that Leverkusen bosses are preparing for life after Alonso.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen 'resigned to losing Xabi Alonso next summer' with two European heavyweights 'keen' on making the Spaniard their next manager… including top Premier League side
arts.sum: The 42-year-old's current deal with the German side ends at the end of the 2025-26 season but is expected to leave in the coming summer, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Man City targeting Xabi Alonso as he prepares for move months after Liverpool snub
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso turned down the chance to leave Bayer Leverkusen in the summer when former club Liverpool were looking to replace Jurgen Klopp, having just won the Bundesliga title

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen planning for Xabi Alonso’s departure
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Bayer Leverkusen are already planning for the departure of their head coach, Xabi Alonso. Over the summer, Bayern Munich attempted to lure Alonso away from the…
